data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages are encrypted during transmission to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Advanced cryptographic protocols such as TLS/SSL.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Users are required to verify their identity with a secondary authentication method.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS codes and authentication apps.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent reviews and audits to identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes internal and third-party auditing tools.

data.title: AI-Driven Threat Detection
data.description: Automatic detection of fraudulent accounts and harmful activities using AI.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms that analyze user behavior patterns.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: A detailed plan outlining steps to respond to security breaches swiftly and effectively.
